name: Medium Decorative Basket - Pink - Cloud Island™
description:
Add extra storage to your newborn's nursery with this Medium Decorative Basket from cloud island™. This decorative storage basket features a light pink and cream woven construction adorned with circular fuzzy tufts for a sweet, textured look. Designed with attached handles for easy portability, this round basket is great for stowing toys, blankets, diapers, baby clothes and more, and it's easy to spot clean.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
